title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on automation and the future of jobs.

questions.question: Do you think artificial intelligence and automation will ultimately create more jobs than they destroy, or is mass unemployment inevitable?
What responsibilities do governments and companies have to workers whose jobs are replaced by automation?

script.text: Do you think artificial intelligence and automation will ultimately create more jobs than they destroy, or is mass unemployment inevitable?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
